title: Understanding Ratios
text: A ratio is a comparison between two quantities. It tells us how much of one thing there is compared to another.

title: Understanding Rates
text: A rate is a specific type of ratio where the two quantities have different units, such as miles per hour or cost per item.

title: Understanding Proportions
text: A proportion is an equation that states that two ratios are equal. For example, if $$\frac{1}{2}$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{2}{4}$$, then these two ratios form a proportion.

title: Finding the GCD
text: To simplify a fraction, find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of the numerator and the denominator. What is the GCD of $$16$$ and 64?

title: Simplifying the Fraction
text: Once you have the GCD, divide both the numerator and the denominator by this number to simplify the fraction.

title: Simplified Fraction
text: What is $$16$$ divided by $$16$$ over $$64$$ divided by 16?
